creator: msnkipa@mail.ru
text:
Motherboard

Vendor: Asus
Model: M2V-MX
Chipset: VIA K8M890 + VIA KT8237+
CPU: Athlon 64 X2 4600+ - SMP works fine
Internal video - works on condole, X system untested
IDE - works fine
SATA (KT8237A) - untested
SATAII (JMicron JMB363) - works fine
On board LAN RLT8100C - Detected as RLT8139, works fine at 100M Full duplex
On board sound - undested and we have the follow

pcib4: <ACPI PCI-PCI bridge> at device 19.0 on pci0
pci4: <ACPI PCI bus> on pcib4
pci4: <multimedia> at device 1.0 (no driver attached)

so i think it doesn`t work :(

USB - works fine

Please add describion for that motherboard to the list of supported MB.
